title: Web Development Project Manager, Non-Coding Role
description:
Web Development Project Manager, Non-Coding Role

Remote, full-time

Strong overlap with CST required



About the role



We are looking for a highly organized, proactive Web Development Project Manager to help manage website projects across our agency.



This is not a developer role. You do not need to code. But you do need to understand how website projects move from kickoff, to design, to development, to QA, to client review, to launch.



You will help keep projects moving, make sure nothing falls through the cracks, maintain our PM systems, manage help desk ticket flow, coordinate with developers and account managers, and ensure work is properly QA’d before it reaches the client.



This role is ideal for someone who has worked inside a digital marketing agency, web agency, or operations-heavy online business, and already understands the basics of website project management, timelines, approvals, revisions, launch readiness, and written client updates.



What success looks like



In this role, success means:



Projects stay organized and updated

Deadlines are visible and realistic

Help desk issues are routed and followed up on quickly

QA is consistent and thorough

Account managers are supported, not blocked

Developers get clear instructions

Clients are not surprised by delays

Leadership does not have to step in to chase status



This role is built around clear ownership, early risk detection, proper handoffs, and consistent follow-through. The PM is expected to protect delivery, not just report on it.



Key responsibilities

Manage active web development and design projects from kickoff through launch and post-launch follow up

Keep project timelines, statuses, next steps, and pending client items updated inside our PM systems

Review and manage help desk tickets multiple times daily, route tickets to the right person, follow up internally, and help maintain SLA response times

Coordinate with developers, designers, account managers, and leadership to keep work moving

QA website work before it is sent for internal review or client review, including links, mobile layout, assets, formatting, tracking, naming, and technical correctness

Ensure work moves through the proper delivery gates and does not skip process

Follow up on blockers, missing assets, approvals, and delayed items before they become emergencies

Help prepare estimates and scope summaries using our internal SOPs, then route them for approval

Assist with launch readiness, post-live checks, and basic troubleshooting coordination

Communicate concise project updates through Slack,
, help desk, and internal project tools

Eventually run our Monday web development meeting and help lead project accountability for the dev lane

Over time, grow into supporting some white-label coordination as well



The QA and delivery side of this role is especially important. In our system, the PM is responsible for checking whether work is built correctly before it reaches the next stage.



Required experience and skills



2+ years of project management or operations experience in a web agency, digital marketing agency, or similar environment

Strong understanding of website project flow, even if you are not a developer

Experience coordinating WordPress projects, Shopify projects, or both

Strong written English and clear, concise communication

Strong attention to detail, especially in QA and follow through

Comfortable working in Slack,
, help desk systems, and project management tools like Basecamp or similar platforms

Able to organize multiple moving projects without losing track of details

Comfortable asking clarifying questions instead of guessing

Able to identify blockers early and escalate appropriately

Comfortable working with deadlines, timelines, revisions, and internal accountability systems

Able to work full-time with strong overlap during CST business hours



Nice to have



Agency experience with web design, web development, or SEO

Familiarity with WordPress, Elementor Shopify, staging sites, hosting, domains, and DNS basics

Experience with launch checklists, tracking setup coordination, or post-live QA

Experience handling white label coordination

Experience preparing quotes or scope summaries

Experience supporting account managers or client communication in an async environment



Schedule and availability



Full-time role

Strong overlap with CST business hours is required

Ideal working window is roughly aligned with a 8 AM to 4 PM CST workday, with some flexibility on exact start and end time

Tea
mbers are expected to be responsive in Slack during working hours, follow daily check-in and check-out expectations, and keep work clearly documented in Basecamp and Slack updates.



What this role is not



Not a coding or developer role

Not a pure client account manager role

Not a generic admin assistant role

Not a role for someone who needs constant supervision or struggles with follow-through

Compensation



Attention to detail check: In the first line of your application, include the phrase “Delivery first, details always.” Applications without that exact phrase in the first line will not be considered.



First 30 to 90 days



First 30 days



Learn our SOPs, communication style, project flow, and QA standards

Shadow current project management and help desk workflows

Begin handling selected tickets, updates, and follow ups



By 60 days



Manage projects more independently

Keep PM systems updated consistently

Reduce dependency on leadership and senior PM support

Improve handoffs between dev, design, and account management



By 90 days



Run the Monday web development meeting

Own the project management lane more independently

Keep timelines accurate, blockers visible, and projects moving with less intervention

How to apply



Please include:



Your relevant project management experience

The platforms and website types you have managed

Your experience with WordPress, Shopify, Basecamp, Slack, QA, and help desk style work

Your normal working hours in your local time zone and how they align with CST

A short note explaining why you are a fit for a non-coding web development PM role



Please keep your application concise and include:



Your current location

Your normal working hours in local time

Your years of PM experience

The project management tool you have used most

title: AI Video Editor & Producer (HeyGen + Motion Graphics | Long-Form Content)
description:
???? Job Overview



We are a fast-growing, U.S.-based company looking for a **highly skilled AI Video Editor / Producer** to create **30–45 minute long-form videos** using **scripts/transcripts and AI avatars (HeyGen)**.



You will take raw transcripts and transform them into **engaging, professional, high-retention videos** by combining:



* AI avatar narration (HeyGen)

* Scene building

* Motion graphics

* Visual storytelling

* Transitions and pacing



This is **NOT basic video editing** — we are looking for someone who can **think like a producer**, not just an editor.



---



# **???? What You’ll Be Doing**



* Turn transcripts into fully produced 30–45 minute videos

* Use **HeyGen AI avatars** for narration

* Break content into structured scenes (like a course or documentary)

* Add:



  * B-roll

  * Motion graphics

  * On-screen text

  * Callouts

  * Transitions

* Create engaging pacing to maintain viewer attention

* Add background music and sound effects where appropriate

* Deliver clean, polished final videos ready for publishing



---



# **???? Ideal Candidate**



You are NOT just a video editor — you:



* Understand **storytelling and flow**

* Know how to **keep attention for long-form content**

* Can take initiative without constant direction

* Think in terms of **viewer experience**



---



# **???? Required Skills**



* Experience with **HeyGen (or similar AI avatar tools)**

* Strong video editing skills (Premiere Pro, Final Cut, CapCut, etc.)

* Motion graphics experience (After Effects or similar)

* Ability to structure long-form content (30–45 minutes)

* Strong English comprehension (you’ll be working from transcripts)

* Experience using stock footage platforms (Envato, Storyblocks, etc.)



---



# **???? Bonus Skills (Highly Preferred)**



* Experience creating:



  * Educational videos

  * Webinars

  * YouTube long-form content

* Basic copywriting / script structuring ability

* Experience with **AI tools** (ChatGPT, Midjourney, etc.)

* Understanding of **marketing / conversion-focused content**



---



# **???? Example of What We Want**



We are creating content similar to:



* Online courses

* Evergreen webinars

* Educational YouTube videos



???? Think:



* Clean

* Engaging

* Professional

* High retention



---



# **? Workload & Pay**



* Ongoing work (multiple videos per week)

* Each video: 30–45 minutes long

* Pay: Based on experience (please include your rate per video or per hour)



---



# **???? How to Apply (IMPORTANT)**



To be considered, you MUST include:



1. **Portfolio** (especially long-form videos)

2. Answer this question:



   > “How would you keep a 30–45 minute video engaging from start to finish?”



---



# **???? Why Join Us**



* Consistent long-term work

* Opportunity to grow into a **Lead Video Producer role**

* Work with cutting-edge AI tools (HeyGen, etc.)

* Be part of building a scalable content engine

title: Real Estate VA
description:
Description

We are looking for a Real Estate Virtual Assistant (VA) who will support real estate agents, property managers, or investors with administrative, marketing, and client management tasks remotely. This role helps streamline operations, enabling the client to focus on sales, client relationships, and business growth.



Key Responsibilities:

Administrative Support:

Manage calendars, schedule appointments, and coordinate meetings.

Handle
 management, respond to inquiries, and follow up on communications.

Prepare and organize documents, contracts, and listing agreements.



Marketing and Lead Generation:

Create and schedule social media posts to promote listings, open houses, and services.

Generate and nurture leads by conducting outreach campaigns via
 or social media.

Prepare marketing materials, property listings, and updates for the company’s website or MLS (Multiple Listing Service).



Client Relationship Management (CRM):

Update and maintain CRM systems with client information, property details, and lead statuses.

Follow up with potential clients, send thank-you notes, and gather feedback on properties.



Data Entry and Documentation:

Input property information and other relevant data into spreadsheets, CRMs, and listing platforms.

Organize and manage virtual files, contracts, and property records.



Property Research and Analysis:

Conduct market research on property values, neighborhood trends, and local real estate data.

Prepare comparative market analyses (CMA) for potential listings.



Transaction Coordination:

Assist with coordinating real estate transactions by managing timelines, paperwork, and communications with clients, lenders, and inspectors.

Ensure all documentation is complete and properly filed in compliance with industry standards.



Requirements

Prior experience in real estate support, administration, or as a VA is preferred.

Proficiency in real estate software, such as MLS, CRM systems (e.g., HubSpot, Salesforce), and Google Workspace.

Proficiency in ASANA

Excellent communication, organization, and multitasking abilities.

Familiarity with real estate terminology, contracts, and transaction processes.

title: Associate Account Manager (Entry-Level | Fresh Graduates Welcome)
description:
About StoryGen

StoryGen (storygen.agency) is a fast-growing B2B lead generation agency that builds and manages outbound sales teams for clients worldwide. We focus heavily on cold calling, supported by strong systems, automation, and AI.



Our success comes from execution, structure, and teamwork and we’re looking for someone who wants to be part of that.



Why This Role Matters

We’re hiring an Associate Account Manager to support the daily execution of client campaigns. This is a great opportunity for fresh graduates or candidates with little to no experience who want to break into sales, operations, or account management.



If you're organized, curious, and eager to learn how outbound sales works behind the scenes, this role is a strong starting point.



You’ll play a key role in keeping campaigns running smoothly, ensuring everything is aligned, optimized, and delivering results.



What You’ll Do

- Help set up outbound campaigns (scripts, targeting, contact lists)

- Assist in writing and improving call scripts and follow-up messaging

- Join onboarding and weekly client calls; take notes and track action items

- Keep client materials organized (ICPs, messaging docs, campaign notes)

- Coordinate with BDRs to ensure campaigns are clear and aligned

- Track performance metrics (meetings booked, attendance rates, etc.)

- Support in creating reports and updates for clients

- Use AI tools to speed up writing, summaries, and admin tasks

- Troubleshoot basic issues across tools like HubSpot, Nooks, and similar platforms

- Provide general support to Account Managers to keep operations running efficiently



What We’re Looking For

This role is open to fresh graduates and candidates without prior experience

- Strong written and verbal communication skills

- Interest in sales, marketing, or outbound strategy

- Tech-savvy or quick to learn new tools

- Willing to learn and use AI tools like ChatGPT

- Highly organized with strong attention to detail

- Comfortable working in a structured, fast-paced environment

- Proactive, dependable, and resourceful

- Positive attitude and strong willingness to grow



Work Schedule

- Monday to Friday

- 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM (Eastern Time)



Compensation & Growth

- USD 1,000/month (entry-level)

- Fully remote setup

- Hands-on training in outbound sales, account management, and AI tools

- Clear career path: Associate ? Account Manager ? Senior Account Manager

- Opportunities to move into strategic or client-facing roles

- Work with a high-performing, fast-growing global team



How to Apply

We use an assessment to ensure a fair and objective hiring.



Please complete the application and submit the following in the same link:



- Resume

- Internet speed test result

- Short Loom audio recording. Prepare and configure Loom in advance before starting the assessment (guide questions are provided in the same link).

 or Zapier.

 & Inbox Management: Use Claude and Gemini to filter your inbox, summarize long threads, and draft responses that match your tone.

, Zapier, or equivalent no-code tools.

-VA Essentials: Highly organized, excellent English communication, proactive problem-solving.

title: Cybersecurity Engineer
description:
We are seeking a skilled and motivated Cybersecurity Engineer to join our team. As a Cybersecurity Engineer, you will play a critical role in protecting our clients’ IT environments by identifying vulnerabilities, implementing security measures, and responding to potential threats.



This is an exciting opportunity to work in a dynamic and collaborative environment, where you’ll help safeguard businesses from cyber risks while growing your expertise in the ever-evolving field of cybersecurity.



Key Responsibilities

* Design, implement, and maintain security solutions to protect IT systems and data.

* Develop and enforce security policies, procedures, and best practices.

* Analyze security alerts, logs, and i
 to identify potential threats.

* Conduct vulnerability assessments to identify and mitigate risks.

* Respond to and investigate security i
, providing detailed reports and recommendations.

* Collaborate with IT teams to ensure systems are configured securely.

* Stay up-to-date with the latest cybersecurity trends, threats, and technologies.

* Provide training and guidance to tea
mbers and clients on cybersecurity best practices.



Technologies You’ll Work With

* Endpoint protection and monitoring tools.

* Firewalls, VPNs, and intrusion detection/prevention systems.

* Cloud security tools for Microsoft 365, Azure, and AWS.

* SIEM platforms.

* Vulnerability scanning tools (e.g., Nessus, Qualys).



What We’re Looking For

* Strong understanding of network security and firewalls.

* Familiarity with vulnerability assessments and i
 response.

* Knowledge of security frameworks and standards (e.g., NIST, ISO 27001, CIS).

* Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills.

* Strong communication skills and the ability to explain technical concepts to non-technical audiences.



Preferred but Not Required:

* Certifications such as CISSP, CEH, CompTIA Security+, or CISM.

* Experience with cloud security (Microsoft 365, Azure, AWS).

* Experience in cybersecurity or a related IT field (2+ years preferred).



Why Join Us?

* Be part of a forward-thinking team dedicated to protecting businesses from cyber threats.

* Opportunities for professional growth and paid certifications.

* Competitive salary and performance-based incentives.

* Monthly healthcare allowance.

* 13th-month pay.

* Structured training and onboarding.

* Company-provided work equipment.

* Remote work flexibility.



How to Apply

If you’re interested in this position, please submit your application and include the numbers (2026) in your subject line. This helps us ensure you’ve read the full job description.



**Please also attach your updated CV to your application or provide a link to your CV. Applications without a CV will not be considered.



**Currently looking for candidates in NCR or nearby areas of the Philippines



*** The working hours for this role are 8:00 AM -5:00 PM CST with an hour of Lunch break, Monday to Friday.



We look forward to hearing from you and exploring how you can contribute to our team!

description:
We’re a London-based creative agency looking for a freelance video editor to support regular short-form editing (reels, TikToks, shorts), with occasional long-form projects.

ROLE FORMAT

- Paid per reel, with rates depending on experience

- Freelance/contract to start, paid per reel (rates based on experience)

- Goal is to bring the right person on full-time - in which case we'd need 10AM-2PM UK time availability for core overlap



RESPONSIBILITIES

- Edit short-form video content regularly, with occasional long-form edits when needed

- Work across multiple client styles while keeping pacing, structure, and polish consistent

REQUIREMENTS

HOW TO APPLY?

Please send a portfolio of recent work (short-form preferred)

title: Technical Problem Solver – Web, Conversion Tracking & Systems (Wix, GA, GTM, Hubspot, others)
description:
Overview:



We are not looking for a manager. We are looking for someone who can figure things out, build systems from scratch, and fix anything that breaks.



This is a part-time, hourly role for a highly resourceful Technical Problem Solver who steps in whenever technical challenges arise across our marketing stack, websites, and business systems. You will not manage systems day-to-day—you will solve problems, implement solutions, and make things work.



The first project will be migrating our entire website into Wix and setting up all Google integrations and conversion tracking. We expect this to take up to a month to complete. After that, you will work on ongoing projects, including building additional websites, troubleshooting issues, and resolving other technical challenges across our systems.



You should be someone who:

*Can understand a problem and turn it into a working solution

*Knows how to research, test, and troubleshoot across multiple platforms

*Is comfortable using tools you haven’t used before

*Takes full ownership of problems until they are solved



You don’t need to know everything—but you must be able to learn quickly and adapt. 

If you enjoy solving complex problems and building functional systems from start to finish, this role is for you.





Key Responsibilities:



A. Marketing & Tracking Systems (Build + Troubleshoot)

*Set up and implement tracking systems (Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, Google Ads, Search Console, YouTube, social media pixels)

*Configure accurate conversion tracking across platforms

*Troubleshoot and fix tracking issues, data discrepancies, or broken integrations

*Implement new tracking or measurement solutions as needed

 

NOTE: This is not a campaign management role. You build and fix, you don’t monitor daily performance



B. Website Development & Systems (Build + Troubleshoot)

*Build websites and landing pages using Wix and other common website builders

*Work with Wix CMS to create dynamic, database-driven pages

*Implement site functionality (forms, tracking, integrations, etc.)

*Troubleshoot and fix issues across front-end, CMS, and integrations

 

NOTE: This is not an ongoing maintenance role. You build it right and fix it when needed



C. Business Systems & Integrations (Build + Troubleshoot)

*Set up and connect business systems (Hubspot, CTM/Dialpad, store locators, other tools)

*Ensure systems communicate properly and data flows correctly

*Troubleshoot and resolve system issues, broken automations, or integration failures

 

NOTE: This is not an operations role. You set up integrations and fix problems, not manage day-to-day usage



Qualifications:



A. Technical Skills

*Experience with marketing and analytics tools (GA, GTM, Ads, Search Console, social pixels)

*Hands-on experience with conversion tracking and pixel implementation

*Proficiency in website builders, especially Wix, including CMS/database-driven pages

*Familiarity with CRMs, business operations tools, and system integrations



B. Soft Skills

*Independent problem-solver with strong critical thinking

*Highly adaptable and able to learn new systems quickly

*Strong communication skills with proactive “over-communication”

*Detail-oriented with a systems-thinking mindset



C. Company Core Values

Radical Candor

Extreme Ownership

Anticipation

Lean

Drive

Overcommunication

Growth Mindset 



Compensation:

Part-time, hourly role

$8–$12 USD per hour, depending on experience and skill level

title: Legal Assistant – Bankruptcy (Remote, EST Hours)
description:
Position: Bankruptcy Legal Assistant (Remote – Pre and Post Filing)

Company: Van Horn Law Group, P.A.



About Us:

Are you the type of person who stays organized, follows through, and takes pride in doing things the right way even when no one is watching?



Van Horn Law Group is one of Florida’s largest and most respected bankruptcy law firms, having helped over 10,000 people get a fresh financial start. We do more than file cases. We guide clients through the entire process with clear communication, structure, and support all the way through discharge.



We are growing quickly and looking for a dependable, detail-oriented Legal Assistant to join our remote team. This role is flexible and may be placed in either our Pre-Filing department, which focuses on preparing cases for filing, or our Post-Filing department, which focuses on working with trustees and moving cases toward discharge. Placement will be based on your strengths.



What You Will Do:

You will communicate with clients to guide them through the next steps in their case and follow up to ensure documents and requirements are completed on time. You will answer questions clearly and professionally while providing reassurance when needed. You will maintain accurate notes and updates in our systems, track deadlines, and make sure cases move forward without delays. Depending on your role, you may assist in preparing cases for filing or work with trustees, courts, and third parties after filing. You will work closely with attorneys and tea
mbers to keep cases organized, accurate, and progressing efficiently.



What We Are Looking For:

You have strong English communication skills and are comfortable speaking with clients in a professional and empathetic way. You are highly detail-oriented and understand that small mistakes can have big consequences. You are organized, able to manage multiple tasks and deadlines, and able to follow structured processes. You take ownership of your work and do not need constant supervision. You are reliable, consistent, and show up ready to perform. Experience in legal, administrative, or client service roles is helpful but not required. You should be comfortable using technology such as Google Workspace, CRM systems, or case management tools.



What Success Looks Like:

Cases move forward without delays or missed steps. Deadlines are consistently met. Clients feel informed, supported, and confident. Communication is clear, proactive, and professional. You take ownership of your work and follow through.



Schedule and Compensation:

This is a full-time remote position at 40 hours per week. Training will take place from 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM Eastern Time for the first two weeks. After training, you will work a night shift aligned with Eastern Time with some flexibility. Compensation ranges from $1,000 to $1,600 USD per month based on experience and performance. Performance-based increases and advancement opportunities are available based on accuracy, productivity, and reliability. This is a long-term, stable position with growth potential.



How to Apply:

Send your resume to 
 and include a short 1-2 minute video introducing yourself. In your video, explain why you are interested in this role, what makes you a strong fit, and any experience you have in legal, administrative, or client service work.



In the subject line of your
, include the word organized so we know you read the full job description and pay attention to detail.



Also, answer this question in your
: You are managing multiple cases, and one client has not submitted the required documents for over a week despite prior follow-ups. What would you do next?



We are not looking for a perfect answer. We are looking for how you think, communicate, and take ownership.

title: AI Fashion Creative (Visual Stylist)
description:
We are a U.S.-based performance marketing agency behind some of the most iconic names in American fashion. We're talking brands with decades of cultural weight, names that have been on runways, on celebrities, and in streetwear history books. We're hiring a full-time AI Creative who will own the visual output for multiple fashion clients, producing lifestyle imagery and product-on-model visuals using AI generation tools.



This is not a graphic design role. We are not looking for someone who makes templates or edits photos. We are looking for someone with a genuine eye for fashion, someone who understands how a brand should FEEL, can study raw inputs and references, and translate them into polished, on-brand AI-generated visuals without constant direction.



What You'll Do:

- Receive raw product images, brand references, or brief direction and produce finished lifestyle and product-on-model visuals

- Generate 20–30+ on-brand visuals per week across multiple fashion clients, each with a distinct aesthetic

- Own the full generation workflow - prompting, refining, quality-checking - from input to final asset

- Work independently with minimal back-and-forth; you're expected to make creative decisions



Tools You Can Use:

- Higgsfield

- Midjourney

- Freepik AI

- Nano Banna Pro

- Any other AI generation tools you're strong in



Who We're Looking For:

- You have a strong fashion eye. You follow fashion brands, editorials, or creators — not because it's your job, but because you're into it

- You've used AI generation tools seriously, not casually. You know how to get a specific result, not just a good-looking one

- You can work across different brand aesthetics. Streetwear, vintage Americana, luxury — you can switch modes

- You are self-directed. You don't need someone to hold your hand on every output

- You take creative ownership. If something looks off-brand, you fix it before sending it



To Apply:

Include the following or your application will not be reviewed:



1) A portfolio or folder of AI-generated visuals you've made

(Optional but strongly preferred: examples specific to fashion or apparel)

2) List the AI tools you use most and briefly describe what you've used each one for

3) What is your expected monthly rate (in USD)?

4) Pick any fashion brand, one you know well, and in 4–6 sentences describe what makes their visual world distinct. Think: mood, color, who's in the imagery, where it's set, how it feels. Then tell us how you would recreate that feel using AI tools.

title: Creative Strategist – Facebook/Meta Ads (Fashion & Apparel)
description:
We don't run ads for random Shopify brands. We run Meta ads for legacy fashion houses - Von Dutch, Ed Hardy, the brands that shaped streetwear culture, the ones your favorite rappers wear, the ones people recognize by the logo alone. If you've been grinding away making ads for no-name DTC brands nobody's heard of, this is your way out.



We're a performance marketing agency scaling fast with some of the most iconic names in fashion as clients. Meta ads are our growth engine. We test relentlessly, we scale winners, and we hold an extremely high bar on creative.



We're hiring a Creative Strategist to own our entire creative operation for fashion and apparel accounts. You'll have full autonomy over creative direction, you'll own the testing roadmap, and you'll earn performance bonuses tied directly to the results you produce. No micromanagement. No slow approvals. No ceiling on what you can earn.



This role is for someone who's obsessed with fashion, understands what makes people stop scrolling and buy, and wants to work with brands that actually matter. If you want comfort and predictability, this isn't for you. If you want to build something real with legacy brands and get paid like it, keep reading.



Key Responsibilities:

- Analyze Meta ad performance data daily to identify winning creatives, dying concepts, and new opportunities

- Build creative briefs and develop new angles, hooks, and concepts across static, video, and UGC formats

- Own and manage a creative testing roadmap - new concepts, iterations, format tests, audience-specific variations

- Script ads, write ad copy, and direct output for designers and editors with clear, actionable feedback

- Research competitors, trends, and cultural 
nts in fashion to fuel the creative pipeline

- Report on creative performance weekly and make strategic recommendations on what to scale, iterate, or kill

- Contribute to creative strategy for new brand launches and product drops



Requirements:

- Direct experience running or strategizing Meta ads for fashion, apparel, or streetwear brands - this is non-negotiable, do not apply without it

- 2+ years in creative strategy, direct response copywriting, or a similar role in DTC e-commerce

- Able to read and interpret Meta ad data directly - hook rate, CTR, CPM, CPA, ROAS - and turn it into creative decisions

- Proficient with creative analysis tools like Motion, Foreplay, Atria, or similar

- Experience managing designers or editors and giving feedback that actually improves output

- Comfortable using AI tools (Claude, Nano Bannana) to accelerate scripting, ideation, and research

- High sense of ownership - you see the gap, you fill it, you don't wait to be told



Why Us:

- You'll work with brands people actually know and care about - not another generic supplement company or dropshipping store

- Your earnings are directly tied to performance with significant uncapped upside

- Your creative decisions will immediately impact how fast we scale iconic fashion brands

- You'll have real autonomy and ownership over the creative function, not a cog-in-the-machine role

- You'll work alongside people who move fast, reject mediocrity, and care about doing things right



If you're a creative strategist who's tired of making ads for brands nobody's heard of and you want to own creative for names that shaped the culture, apply now.



To Apply:

1. What fashion or apparel brands have you run or strategized Meta ads for? (One sentence is fine.)

2. Upload your portfolio or resume. (PDF or link.)



If you don't have fashion/apparel industry experience, please don't apply.

 • Clean backend workflows

 • Simple systems that actually drive revenue



We don’t just build pages. We build machines that generate clients.



If you like solving real problems and not just clicking buttons, you’ll fit here.



?



The Role



We’re hiring a WordPress + Elementor Developer who can take a Figma design and turn it into a clean, responsive, production-ready site.



This is a specialist-first role.



Your main focus is WordPress.



Over time, there is an opportunity to expand into other platforms (Wix, Squarespace, GHL), but only after you are fully confident in your core role.



We don’t throw random tasks at you. We build skills intentionally.



?



What We’re Looking For



You’re not just a task-doer.



You take ownership of builds and care about how things actually look and function.



You don’t guess. You think.



?



Must-Have Skills

 • Strong experience with WordPress + Elementor

 • Ability to translate Figma designs into pixel-clean layouts

 • Solid understanding of mobile and tablet responsiveness

 • Experience working with Custom Post Types (CPTs)

 • Can troubleshoot:

 • layout issues

 • plugin conflicts

 • responsive bugs

 • Strong attention to spacing, alignment, and visual consistency



?



Bonus Skills (Not Required)

 • Basic PHP knowledge (shortcodes, template tweaks)

 • Familiarity with Wix, Squarespace, or GoHighLevel

 • Experience with GoHighLevel (GHL) or CRM-based page builders

 • Understanding of site speed and basic SEO structure

 • Comfortable with Slack, Zapier, Google Drive, Loom



?



Responsibilities

 • Build full pages in Elementor based on Figma designs

 • Ensure clean, responsive layouts across all devices

 • Implement dynamic content using CPTs when needed

 • QA your own work before submitting (no sloppy handoffs)

 • Fix layout, spacing, and styling issues proactively

 • Follow build timelines and communicate blockers early



As you grow in the role, you may:

 • Support builds on other platforms (Wix, Squarespace, GHL)

 • Help improve internal build systems and workflows



?



How to Apply



Record a Loom video (3–5 minutes):

 • Introduce yourself

 • Walk us through a WordPress + Elementor site you built

 • Show the backend

 • Explain how you handled:

 • layout

 • responsiveness

 • dynamic content (if applicable)



Send to: 



Subject line:

[Your Name] – WP Developer Application – Mango



Include:

 • Loom video link

 • Resume

 • Links/screenshots of past work



?



This Role Is NOT For You If

 • You’ve never worked with Elementor

 • You need constant supervision or reminders

 • You submit work without checking it first

 • You disappear, miss deadlines, or make excuses



?



This Role IS For You If

 • You take pride in clean, high-quality builds

 • You like solving problems, not just following steps

 • You want to grow your skillset over time (not all at once)

 • You move fast, communicate clearly, and take ownership

 • You want to be part of a team that actually builds real systems



?



Final Note



We value people who are:

 • Reliable

 • Proactive

 • Detail-oriented



You don’t need to know everything.



But you do need to figure things out.

title: Remote Intake Specialist (Bankruptcy Law Firm)
description:
Company: Van Horn Law Group, P.A.



About Us:

Are you the type of person who is naturally friendly, organized, and makes people feel comfortable the 
nt they speak with you?



Van Horn Law Group is one of Florida’s leading bankruptcy law firms, having helped over 10,000 people get a fresh financial start. When clients call us, they are often stressed, overwhelmed, and looking for guidance. The first person they speak to matters.



We are looking for a dependable, professional Remote Receptionist who can create a strong first impression, keep calls organized, and help guide potential clients to the right next step. This is a long-term opportunity with a growing firm that values consistency, positivity, and accountability.



What You Will Do:

You will answer incoming calls and direct them to the appropriate tea
mbers while maintaining a warm and professional tone. You will make outbound calls to confirm appointments and follow up with potential clients. You will manage voi
s, call logs, and notes in our CRM system and ensure all information is accurate and up to date. You will provide basic information about our services and help guide callers to the next step, including scheduling consultations. You will also support other departments with communication and administrative tasks as needed.



What We Are Looking For:

You have excellent English communication skills and a confident, friendly phone presence. You are naturally positive and know how to make people feel heard and comfortable. You are organized, reliable, and able to handle a high volume of calls without losing attention to detail. You are comfortable speaking with individuals who may be going through financial stress and can remain calm and professional at all times. You are able to multitask, follow structured processes, and take ownership of your role. Experience as a receptionist, virtual assistant, or in customer service is a plus. You should be comfortable using tools such as Google Workspace, Slack, and CRM systems.



What Success Looks Like:

Calls are answered promptly and professionally. Clients feel welcomed and confident after speaking with you. Appointments are scheduled accurately and efficiently. Call notes are clear and complete. You stay organized, responsive, and consistent throughout your shift.



Schedule and Compensation:

This is a full-time remote position at 40 hours per week. Training will take place during 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM Eastern Time for the first two weeks. After training, you will work a night shift aligned with Eastern Time with some flexibility. Compensation ranges from 800 to 1400 USD per month based on experience and performance. Performance-based increases and advancement opportunities are available based on reliability, communication, and overall performance. This is a long-term, stable position with growth potential.



How to Apply:

Send your resume to 
 and include a short 1 to 2 minute video introducing yourself. In your video, explain why you are interested in this role, what makes you a strong fit, and any experience you have in reception, customer service, or client communication.



In the subject line of your
, include the word friendly so we know you read the full job description and pay attention to detail.



Also answer this question in your
: A potential client calls in but sounds frustrated and says they have already spoken to two law firms and did not get clear answers. How would you handle that call?



We are not looking for a perfect answer. We are looking for how you communicate, how you handle pressure, and how you take ownership of the interaction.

title: Digital Operations & CRM Moonstride Data officer
description:
CRM & Digital Systems officer. The role is responsible for owning and executing the full data architecture, migration, and ongoing management of all core digital systems, including WordPress, Moonstride CRM, and Mailchimp. The principal objective is to ensure in Moonstride and Web that all product, pricing, itinerary, and customer data is fully structured, consistent, and commercially usable to support scalable sales growth. The position defines how data is organised across systems, where it is stored, and how it flows between platforms, ensuring alignment between website content, CRM operations, and marketing automation.

The role includes structuring and uploading all website content in WordPress, managing and building all travel products, pricing logic, and itineraries in Moonstride, and leading the migration, cleaning, and validation of all existing data. It also includes ownership of the customer database, ensuring segmentation readiness and high data quality, as well as setting up and managing Mailchimp audiences, tagging, and automation flows. A key responsibility is maintaining consistency across all systems and implementing clear data governance processes to avoid duplication, errors, or misalignment.

This position supports the sales function directly by ensuring that all data enables fast quotation, personalised offers, and efficient booking processes. It requires strong experience in CRM management, WordPress, and
 marketing tools, combined with the ability to define data structures and not only execute tasks. The role is operational but strategic in impact, acting as a core pillar for scaling the business, improving sales efficiency, and enabling a structured and high-performing digital infrastructure

title: Content Specialist with SEO Experience
description:
NOTE: Please do not
 the client directly. We will only accommodate applicants who apply through OnlineJobs.



Join a remote team supporting a semi-famous American CEO and his portfolio of websites and clients! As featured in The Wall Street Journal and The New York Times. Your work will directly impact the SEO performance and growth of multiple websites and help real clients succeed online.



WHY IS THIS JOB AWESOME?

• Permanent WFH — forever, no commute, no office politics

• Great pay

• Fun team that genuinely values Filipino staff

• No two days are the same: diverse tasks across SEO, content, tools, and client calls

• A work culture that actually respects your sleep and rest — we mean it

• Flexible split-shift schedule designed around your life

• Fun boss (NICK MADE US TYPE THIS)

• Nick Gray loves arroz caldo and pork sisig. A true Filipino at heart.



ABOUT THE ROLE

We're looking for someone who lives and breathes SEO, is comfortable jumping on client calls, and knows how to use AI tools to work smarter — not just faster. You won't be writing articles from scratch, but you will be the person who knows exactly what a great article needs: the right structure, the right keywords, the right headings, internal links, meta descriptions, and everything else that makes content rank.



This is a hands-on, execution-focused role. You'll be working across multiple websites, helping clients improve their search presence, and occasionally talking directly with clients to explain what you're doing and why.



SALARY AND BENEFITS

• Pay rate: $7–$10/hour depending on experience

• Government dues are the responsibility of the applicant



HOURS AND AVAILABILITY

• Core hours: 7:30 AM – 1:00 PM Central Time (includes a 30-minute break)

• Remaining 3 hours are async — work them anytime within the same day, on your own schedule

• Total of approximately 5 hours of live overlap + 3 hours flexible per day

• Split-shift friendly: we respect your time, your rest, and your life outside of work



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

SEO



• Conduct keyword research and on-page SEO optimization for blog posts and web pages

• Perform SEO audits and implement improvements across client websites

• Set up and monitor Google Search Console, identify issues, and act on data

• Write and optimize meta titles and descriptions

• Handle internal linking, schema, image alt text, and other on-page best practices

• Track rankings and report on SEO progress



Content & AI-Assisted Writing



• Use AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, etc.) to assist with content production

• Know what makes a blog post rank: proper structure, headers, keyword placement, word count, readability, and CTAs

• Edit and refine AI-generated drafts to meet SEO and quality standards

• Brief writers or AI tools with the right inputs so content comes out right the first time



Client Communication



• Talk through content ideas and site updates directly with clients

• Join calls with clients to discuss SEO strategy, progress, and recommendations

• Communicate clearly and professionally — you're calm, articulate, and easy to talk to

• Send follow-up
s summarizing calls and next steps



Tools & Systems



• Use AI coding tools like Claude Code, Cursor, or similar to build or improve small internal tools and automations when needed

• Comfortable exploring and adopting new tools quickly



REQUIREMENTS

• Proven SEO experience — you've done this before and have results to show

• Fluent spoken and written English — strong communicator on calls and in writing

• Comfortable on video calls with clients

• Familiar with AI tools: Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, or similar

• Working knowledge of Google Search Console, and ideally other SEO tools (Ahrefs, Semrush, Moz, Yoast, RankMath)

• Beginner-to-intermediate writing skills — you don't need to be a novelist, but you understand what good content looks like

• 50Mbps wired internet connection

• Desktop or laptop, plus headset and camera for calls

• Quiet working space



Nice to Have



• Experience with AI coding tools like Claude Code, Cursor, or Gemini in IDEs

• WordPress experience

• Familiarity with Airtable, Trello, or Google Suite



PERSONALITY OF IDEAL CANDIDATE

• Positive, reliable, and genuinely trustworthy

• Curious and always learning — especially about AI and SEO changes

• Proactive: you don't wait to be told, you spot problems and act

• Organized with strong attention to detail

• Adaptable — our work evolves fast and you roll with it



SOFTWARE TOOLS USED

• Google Search Console

• WordPress

• Claude / ChatGPT / Gemini

• Cursor or Claude Code (a plus)

• Google Suite: Docs, Sheets, Gmail

• Ahrefs / Semrush / Moz

• Yoast SEO or RankMath

• Trello

• Airtable

• Loom

•



HOW TO APPLY — LOOM VIDEO (REQUIRED)

Instead of a traditional cover letter, we want to see and hear from you directly. Record a 3–5 minute Loom video with your camera on and cover the following:



1. Quick intro — who you are and your background

2. Your SEO experience — describe one specific win you've had. What was the site, what did you do, and what happened to the rankings or traffic?

3. AI tools — what tools do you use regularly (Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, Cursor, Claude Code, etc.) and how do you actually use them in your work?

4. Client calls — how comfortable are you on video calls with clients, on a scale of 1–10? Share an example of a time you explained something technical to a non-technical person.



Camera must be on. Applications without a Loom video will not be considered.



Include "SEO + AI" in your subject line so we know you read this far.

title: Remote Cold Caller / Sales Development Representative (SDR ) / BDR / Appointment Setter
description:
About StoryGen

StoryGen (storygen.agency) is a rapidly scaling B2B lead generation agency focused on helping companies build predictable outbound pipelines. We specialize in cold calling, where our Business Development Representatives (BDRs)/Cold Callers drive the first touch connecting with prospects, qualifying opportunities, and booking meetings that turn into real revenue.



Our clients range from early-stage startups to well-established businesses across SaaS, fintech, IT services, digital marketing, staffing, and consulting. The work you do here directly impacts pipeline growth and client success.



About the Role

We’re looking for driven BDRs/Cold Callers who thrive in outbound sales and are comfortable making a high volume of calls daily. You’ll run structured outreach campaigns, follow tested frameworks, and focus on consistently booking qualified meetings.



This role is a strong fit for someone who is disciplined, detail-oriented, and confident in cold prospecting.



How to Apply

To ensure a fair and unbiased hiring process, all applicants must complete the assessment then submit the following in the same link:



- Updated resume

- Internet speed test result

- Short Loom audio recording. Prepare and configure Loom in advance before starting the assessment (guide questions are provided in the same link).



Apply here:





What You’ll Do

- Conduct high-volume outbound calls to B2B decision-makers

- Execute scripts, messaging frameworks, and objection-handling techniques

- Keep CRM records accurate and up to date

- Manage post-booking steps (confirmations, intros, gifting links when needed)

- Follow up with warm leads to increase conversion rates

- Coordinate with clients in real time to ensure smooth handoffs

- Share feedback on lead quality, scripts, and messaging

- Work closely with the team to maintain consistent pipeline output

- Stay aligned with client messaging and report insights from conversations



What We’re Looking For

- Experience in a B2B SDR/BDR role (cold calling-focused)

- Proven ability to meet or exceed activity and meeting targets

- Strong attention to detail, especially in CRM usage

- Confident communicator with solid objection-handling skills

- Quick learner, adaptable to new tools and processes

- Collaborative team player

- Professional and clear in both spoken and written communication

- Comfortable working remotely in a fast-paced environment

- Experience with tools like HubSpot, Slack, Calendly, Coda, Nooks (or similar) is a plus



Compensation & Perks

- USD 1,000  base salary

- Uncapped commission per qualified meeting held

- Fully remote setup

- Monday–Friday schedule (8:30 AM – 6:00 PM EST)

- Exposure to multiple B2B industries

- Clear path for career growth into leadership roles

- Performance-driven, supportive team environment

title: Digital Sales & Growth Executive (VA)
description:
About Maverrik 



Maverrik is a B2B training, coaching, and consulting company focused on social selling, LinkedIn strategy, and digital growth. We train small, medium and enterprise businesses to increase their pipeline. 



The Mission



We are looking for a sharp, detail-oriented Digital Sales & Growth Executive VA to become the "engine room" of our sales process. You won’t just be doing data entry; you will be managing the lifecycle of our prospects from the 
nt they join a webinar/ event to the 
nt they receive a formal proposal.



You will also support nurturing these prospects until they become clients. 



Your goal is to ensure no lead falls through the cracks, and the Business Development Director / Trainer stays focused on high-level strategy while you handle the coordination and sales support



Key Responsibilities



1. Event & Webinar Ecosystem



- Lead Management: Bridge the gap between webinar platforms and our CRM (Zoho).

- The Follow-Up Machine: Execute a multi-touch follow-up process via LinkedIn and
 (Pre and Post-event).4

- Prospect Qualification: Analyse attendee lists to their personas, size of deals and which ones to prioritise for follow-ups.



2. Sales Asset & CRM Coordination



- Proposal Drafting: Reviewing sales call recordings to extract "bones" (pain points, pricing, specific needs) and populating our formal proposal templates.

- Zoho CRM Hygiene: Maintaining a "Zero-Gaps" policy. Every lead must have a documented "Next Step" and a due date.



3. LinkedIn Management & Prospecting



- Inbox Triage: Managing the Business Development Director’s LinkedIn inbox, tagging hot leads, clearing spam, and responding to FAQs in the Director's voice.

- Social Selling: Engaging with key prospects by commenting on their posts to maintain "top-of-mind" awareness.

Outbound Sourcing: Building targeted prospect lists based on webinar engagement and beginning the process



4. Content & Logistics



-Content Implementation: Taking raw video/images provided by the Business Development Director to schedule weekly thought-leadership posts.

- Logistics: Managing calendar invites, "pre-work"
s, and reminders to ensure a as close to 100% turn-up rate for sales calls.



Required Skills & Experience



- CRM Mastery: Experience with [Zoho] is essential.

- LinkedIn Savvy: Deep understanding of LinkedIn etiquette and Sales Navigator.

- Copywriting: Ability to adapt to a specific "voice" and draft professional, non-templated, natural -feeling messages.

- High Attention to Detail: To ensure proposal drafts  and follow-up drafts are relevant to the specific prospect, as we have an abundance of leads

- Sales Expertise: Sales Literacy: You must understand the sales funnel. You know the difference between a "Cold Lead," a "Warm Prospect," and an "MQL" (Marketing Qualified Lead).

- Contextual Drafting: You can listen to a sales call recording and identify the "Gap" where the client is now vs. where they want to be, and reflect that accurately in a written proposal.



Technical Requirements

- Stable, high-speed internet connection (with backup).

- Noise-cancelling headset for occasional sync meetings.

- Experience using Loom, LinkedIn, Sales Navigator, AI and Zoho



Why Join Us?



Salary: [Insert Amount P/ hour

Hours: 9 AM - 10 PM GMT (find a suitable working pattern and hours in the interview

Growth: We believe in training. You will learn the inner workings of a high-growth sales training consultancy





How to Apply



Please do not use the "Apply Now" button alone. To be considered, please send an
 to 
 with the subject line: "I am your Sales Ops VA - [Your Name]" and include:

A summary of your experience managing a CRM and LinkedIn

A 1-minute Loom video introducing yourself.

A summary of your sales experience and driven personality.

title: Senior Product Manager
description:
Location: Remote (Work from Home)  

Job Type: Full Time  

Experience: 5+ years



### About Us



We are on a mission to simplify the purchasing and management of supplies for real-estate properties. Our platform is transforming how property owners and managers procure essential items—making the process more efficient, transparent, and cost-effective. Join us in building software that meaningfully improves day-to-day property operations.



### Role Description



As a Product Manager, you will own the end-to-end product lifecycle for key areas of our platform. You’ll sit at the intersection of engineering, business, and users—translating real-world operational needs into clear product requirements. This role is ideal for someone who is organized, user-focused, and comfortable working closely with our clients and our engineering team in a remote environment.



### Key Responsibilities



- Define and own product requirements for core platform features related to purchasing, orders, vendors, and property workflows.

    

- Gather and synthesize input from customers, internal stakeholders, and leadership to inform product decisions.

    

- Write clear product requirements, user stories, and acceptance criteria.

    

- Manage the product backlog and prioritize work based on impact, effort, and business goals.

    

- Collaborate with engineering teams throughout the development lifecycle to ensure timely and high-quality delivery.

    

- Support product launches by coordinating documentation, internal communication, and rollout plans.

    

- Continuously identify opportunities to improve usability, efficiency, and customer satisfaction.

    



### Qualifications



- 5+ years of experience in product management, preferably in a SaaS or B2B environment.

 

- Strong understanding of user-centered design and product discovery practices.

    

- Proven ability to manage competing priorities and drive projects to completion.

    

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

    

- Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.

    

- Self-motivated and comfortable working independently as part of a fully remote team.

    



### Nice to Have



- Experience with e-commerce, procurement, or marketplace platforms.

    

-  Familiarity with tools like Jira, Linear, or similar product management systems.

    

- Experience working with distributed or fully remote engineering teams.

    



### How to Apply



If you are a product manager who enjoys building practical, high-impact software and collaborating with strong engineering teams, we’d love to hear from you. Please submit your resume and a brief cover letter outlining your experience and interest in joining our team.

title: Website Graphics Assistant (Contract-Based)
description:
Website Graphics Assistant / Graphic Designer (Contract-Based)



We are looking for a creative **Website Graphics Assistant / Graphic Designer** to help develop original visual assets for a growing lifestyle brand.



This role will focus on creating graphics for **website use, apparel, accessories, and digital products**. Projects may include product graphics, website banners, promotional visuals, collection graphics, simple branding support, and marketplace-ready design assets.



Design themes may include **campus life, humor, cottagecore, pop-culture-inspired concepts, and lifestyle graphics**. We are looking for someone who enjoys creating **bold, fun, original, and commercially safe designs** that fit an online brand environment.



This is a **contract-based role**. Strong designers may also have opportunities for longer-term collaboration and potential publishing opportunities through our marketplace stores if their work aligns with our brand direction.



 Responsibilities:



* Create original graphic designs for website use, apparel, accessories, and digital products

* Design visual assets such as banners, collection graphics, product images, promotional graphics, and simple branded layouts

* Prepare designs suitable for print-on-demand and e-commerce production

* Ensure all designs follow commercial-use, originality, and copyright-safe guidelines

* Deliver files in production-ready formats such as PNG, vector, or layered source files

* Collaborate on creative concepts, seasonal themes, and product directions

* Maintain consistency with brand style, quality standards, and marketplace requirements



 Ideal Candidate



We are looking for someone who:



- has experience creating graphics for e-commerce, apparel, merchandise, or digital products

- understands online design trends and marketplace presentation

-can create original, non-copyrighted artwork

- is familiar with print-on-demand design requirements

- has a strong creative eye for layout, branding, and product presentation

- can follow direction while also contributing fresh ideas

-  is organized, responsive, and able to deliver production-ready files



Experience with tools such as:



* Adobe Illustrator

* Photoshop

* Procreate

* Canva

* Figma

* other digital illustration or graphic design tools



is a plus.



 Opportunity for Designers



In addition to contract design work, designers whose work strongly fits our brand may have the opportunity to collaborate on designs for our online marketplace stores.



This may provide additional exposure and potential revenue opportunities for high-quality work. Any collaboration terms will be discussed individually.



### To Apply



Please include the following:



* A link to your design portfolio

* Examples of website graphics, apparel designs, or merchandise designs you have created

* The design tools you use

* Your typical rate per project or per design

* Your turnaround time for a typical project



Very Important



To confirm that you read this job post, please start your message with the word:



**Design**



Applications without this word may not be reviewed.

title: E-Commerce Video Editor (MASTER WITH AI)
description:
Quick Summary

Daily Output: 3–4 concepts (30–90 seconds each)



Focus: Ultra-realistic AI product b-roll & talking characters



Location: Remote



About the Role

We are looking for a High-Volume AI Video Editor who can operate at the intersection of creative storytelling and cutting-edge technology. This is not a traditional "trimming" role; you will be responsible for prompting and generating entire scenes from scratch. You must be able to produce 3 to 4 finished video concepts per day that look like they were shot in a million-dollar studio.



Key Responsibilities

Rapid Concepting: Produce 3–4 unique video concepts daily, ranging from 30 to 90 seconds.



AI Product Cinematography: Generate ultra-realistic b-roll of product packaging with perfect lighting, textures, and fluid camera movements.



AI Character Creation: Build and animate hyper-realistic talking characters with seamless lip-syncing and emotive performance.



End-to-End Editing: Handle all prompting, upscaling, color grading, sound design, and final assembly.



Required Technical Stack

You must be an expert in the following tools to hit our daily output goals:



Video Generation: Runway Gen-3/Gen-4, Luma Dream Machine, or Kling.



Character/Voice: HeyGen (Avatar/Lip-sync), ElevenLabs (Voice), and D-ID.



Image/Product Gen: Midjourney (v6+) and Leonardo.ai (for consistent product styles).



Editing/Post-Production: Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or CapCut Desktop.



AI Enhancement: Topaz Video AI (for upscaling and cleaning AI artifacts).



Requirements

Speed: Ability to turn a concept into a polished video in under 2 hours.



Eye for Realism: You know how to spot and fix "AI-jank" (glitches, weird limbs, or unnatural lighting).



Proactive: You stay up-to-date with the weekly changes in the AI video landscape.

title: Sales & Enrollment Specialist (Education/Coaching)
description:
Job Title: Sales & Enrollment Specialist (Education/Coaching)

Company: The College Game

Location: Remote (OnlineJobs.ph)

Type: Full-Time / Part-Time (Specify your preference)



About the Role

Are you a persuasive communicator who loves helping students and parents navigate the journey to college success? The College Game is looking for a results-driven Sales & Enrollment Specialist to join our growing team.



Your mission is simple: Turn our community members and leads into successful students by matching them with the right coaching services, courses, and resources. You will be the "bridge" between our free content (like our Podcast) and our life-changing paid programs.



Key Responsibilities

Direct Sales: Reach out to leads via
, social media DMs, and discovery calls to close sales for our flagship courses: College Success 101, The Admissions Playbook, The Financial Aid Playbook, and The College Athlete.



Community Growth: Actively move members from our unpaid community into our paid "Inner Circle" community.



Session Booking: Schedule prospective students and parents for coaching sessions with our founder.



Podcast Promotion: Encourage leads and current clients to engage with our weekly Podcast to build trust and brand authority.



CRM Management: Track all interactions and sales progress within our Kajabi platform (training provided, but familiarity is a plus!).



What We’re Looking For

Proven Sales Experience: At least 2+ years in digital sales, enrollment, or high-ticket coaching sales.



Exceptional English Skills: You must have world-class written and verbal communication skills. You’ll be talking to parents and students in the US.



The "Hustle" Mentality: You don't wait for leads to come to you; you enjoy the "hunt" and follow up consistently.



Empathy: You understand that choosing a college is stressful. You can sell with "heart" rather than just using high-pressure tactics.



Kajabi Knowledge: If you already know how to navigate Kajabi’s back end, you’ll be our top candidate!



Why Join The College Game?

Work with a passionate team (Project Manager, IT Expert, Copywriter, and Social Media Manager).



Flexible remote work environment.



Competitive base salary plus performance-based commissions/bonuses.



The chance to make a real impact on the lives of students and their families.



How to Apply

title: Virtual Assistant - Permanent Role
description:

At Mi PA, our Virtual Assistants are a core part of our company, not just external support. Most of our VAs have been with us for years, and we invest in long-term relationships because we know that when you grow, we grow!

• The same holidays and length-of-service benefits as our UK team.

• Annual pay reviews as a minimum - your hard work will always be recognised.

• Opportunities for career development within a growing company.

• A dynamic, fast-paced role working with a variety of global clients.

• A friendly, supportive team that values and respects its Virtual Assistants.



**About Mi PA**

Mi PA is a leading UK-based virtual personal assistant and call answering service. Our PA team ensures our clients receive world-class customer support. We’re looking for a Virtual Assistant to join our dynamic team.



**What You’ll Be Doing**

This is an execution-based role. You’ll receive requests from our friendly EAs, who, along with videos and text processes to help, will be on hand for 1-2-1 support. Some of the tasks you’ll be responsible for could include:

• Customer Support
s

?

?

?

?

?

?

?

?

title: Shopify Web Developer - CRO Specialist - Ecommerce Advertising Agency - Full Time 4a
description:
APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED: 





CRO Shopify Web Developer – Job Overview

I am looking for an experienced shopify web developer to help me upgrade client’s checkout processes and execute CRO tests for various ecommerce brands.

In this role you will update Shopify theme templates, develop landing pages using various page builders and html/CSS frameworks, research/install various checkout/bundle applications, and implement A/B tests using testing tools like intelligems.

You will also report on test performance, and provide suggestions for next steps.

This is a full-time opportunity. Training will be provided and you will work directly with me.



About Zack Miller

My name is Zack Miller, and I’ve been a DTC Ecommerce Growth Marketer since 2019. I’ve done everything fro
dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

I’ve contributed to the growth of over 200 ecommerce brands in my agency experience. Now, as an independent growth marketing partner, I work closely with a small number of brands on their new customer acquisition strategy.



Note: All Remote Employees Must Be Available To Work During The Following Business Hours:

Monday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Tuesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Wednesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Thursday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Friday: 9am – 5:30pm EST



Roles & Responsibilities

- Develop landing pages using Figma and various WYSYWIG editors including but not limited to Replo and Pagefly.

- Edit product, collection and other page templates using Shopify Liquid template engine, and various HTML/CSS frameworks.

- Install various checkout/tracking applications (aftersell, Zipify OCU, Upstack, etc)

- Install various applications for product bundling when needed, and create product bundles. 

- Install tracking pixels on client’s websites

- Implement A/B tests in intelligems for product price tests, shipping price tests, theme tests, landing page tests, and more. 

- Research new ideas for direct response content marketing strategies.

- Work in my project management system, ClickUp.

- Apply a process-first mentality and provide feedback to help further develop our operating systems.



Required Experience & Education

- Strong verbal and written English language skills (American Dialect)

- Strong knowledge of HTML/CSS/Javascript/Shopify Liquid required. 

- Knowledge of Python and Ruby preferred but not required.

- 1+ years of web development (Shopify) experience required

- 1+ years of backend python (flask/django) development experience preferred but not required

- 1+ years of marketing agency experience preferred but not required

- Must be highly organized and possess strong attention to detail

- All applicants are encouraged to apply, regardless of experience or education

title: Guest Experience Operator (Customer Care) | Short-Term Rentals
description:
Company: 5 Seasons Homestays

 Location: Remote

Type: Full-time Virtual Assistant

Openings: 1



About Us

5 Seasons Homestays is a short-term rental property management and co-hosting company. We specialize in delivering exceptional stays through strong communication, fast resolutions, and consistent operational standards.



Role Overview

We are hiring one Guest Experience Operator to handle guest messaging, reservation support, listing updates, and issue resolution across multiple channels. This role is ideal for someone who is warm, calm under pressure, highly detail-oriented, and confident communicating at a native level.



Key Responsibilities:

Manage guest communications across platforms (inbox, SMS,
, and calls as needed)

Respond quickly and professionally to inquiries, requests, and guest issues

Support reservations, stay instructions, check-in/check-out guidance, and troubleshooting

De-escalate complaints and turn negative situations into positive outcomes

Coordinate with internal operations (maintenance/cleaning) to resolve issues fast

Update listings and guest-facing instructions to reduce repeat questions/issues

Document issues, preferences, and follow-ups for team continuity

Maintain response-time standards and high guest satisfaction





Required Qualifications (Must-Have):

C2-level English proficiency (native-level speaking and writing)

Strong warm, professional, conversational communication style with empathy

Customer service mindset with excellent de-escalation and problem-solving skills

Ability to manage multiple chats/conversations at once without missing details

Reliable internet, quiet workspace, and ability to handle calls professionally





Preferred Qualifications

Hospitality / customer support / travel industry experience

Short-term rental guest communication experience (
)

Familiarity with SOP-based operations





What Makes 5 Seasons Homestays Different

We treat guest experience as a system, not improvisation

Clear standards, strong training, and a team that values ownership and follow-through

Growth potential into senior guest operations or team lead roles





How to Apply (Required)

1. Send your updated resume

2. Submit ONE Loom video (max 5 minutes) covering the tasks below



How to submit: Record at 
 and send the link with your application.



TASK 1: Introduction (1 minute)

- Introduce yourself

- Share relevant experience

- Why this role at 5 Seasons Homestays?





TASK 2: Multi-Channel Communication Scenario (2 minutes)

At 2 PM you are handling:

- Phone call: guest on hold about Wi-Fi issue

- SMS: guest asking about early check-in (3 hours early)

-
: upset guest complaining about noisy neighbors at 1 AM last night

Show how you prioritize, and give your word-for-word response to ONE scenario.



Important: Applications without the Loom video will not be reviewed.

title: Senior Graphic Designer
description:
We are seeking a Senior Graphic Designer to join our team. In this role, you will play a crucial role in creating visually appealing and impactful designs across multiple mediums, including digital, video and print. Your creativity and expertise will contribute to enhancing client brand identities, marketing materials, and overall visual communication.



Responsibilities

- Develop and design creative graphics and video content aligned with client objectives and brand guidelines.

- Create visual concepts, graphics, and layouts for digital and print media (including newsletters and UX design).

- Collaborate with clients and internal tea
mbers to understand design requirements and deliver compelling visual solutions.

- Ensure all designs are visually appealing, on-brand, and effectively communicate the intended message.

- Stay up to date with design trends, tools, and best practices to ensure high-quality and innovative output.

- Provide revisions and refinements based on client feedback to achieve desired results.



Requirements

- Proven experience as a Senior Graphic Designer or in a similar role, supported by a strong portfolio of successful design projects.

- Mandatory experience with the following tools is a must: Figma (Website UX Deisgn), Capcut, Premier Pro (Video Creation) Adobe Suite platforms (Graphic Design).

- Experience across the full Adobe Suite is required.

- Experience in and kit creation.

- Strong understanding of typography, colour theory, layout, and visual composition.

- Excellent problem-solving skills with strong attention to detail.

- Ability to work independently in a remote environment with minimal supervision.



Location

- Remote position - only candidates based in the Philippines will be considered.



Schedule

- Part-time or Full-time



Benefits

- Competitive compensation based on experience and project scope.

- Opportunity to work with diverse clients and industries.

- Professional growth and development within a creative agency environment.

- Flexible work schedule and fully remote setup.



How to Apply

Interested candidates are invited to send a message with their resume and portfolio (mandatory) showcasing relevant and successful design projects. Please highlight your experience with CapCut, Adobe Creative Suite, and your overall approach to effective graphic design.



Depending on the interview we may also share a test project which you can submit with your own watermark.



**Applications without a portfolio will not be considered. NO VA to apply (you will be automatically deleted)**
