title: Full-Time 3D Hard Surface Artist — Sci-Fi & Military Vehicles (Game-Ready Assets)
description:
We are building a 3D asset business selling game-ready vehicle packs on platforms like Fab (Epic Games), CGTrader, and TurboSquid. We are looking for a skilled hard surface 3D artist to join full-time and produce sci-fi and military vehicles, props, and modular environment pieces.



You will receive detailed reference images and a production schedule for each asset pack. Your job is to model, UV unwrap, texture, rig (where needed), render, and export each model to strict quality standards. Every asset must be game-ready, PBR-compatible, and delivered in multiple file formats.

This is a long-term position. If you produce quality work on time, there is room for pay increases as revenue grows.



WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING

• Modeling hard surface vehicles, weapons, props, and environment kits from provided reference images

• Creating clean, optimized topology suitable for real-time game engines (UE5, Unity)

• UV unwrapping with efficient, non-overlapping layouts and consistent texel density

• Texturing with PBR Metallic-Roughness workflow in Substance Painter, Quixel Mixer, or equivalent

• Creating 3 LOD levels per model (LOD0 full detail, LOD1 50% reduction, LOD2 25%)

• Exporting to multiple formats: FBX, OBJ, BLEND (mandatory); MAX, Maya (if available)

• Producing all required renders: hero shots, multi-angle, wireframe overlays, UV layout screenshots, textured vs. untextured comparisons

• Creating 15-second turntable videos (MP4, 1080p) for each model

• Basic rigging and animation where specified (turret rotation, wheel spin, walk cycles, hatch open/close)

• Maintaining consistent design language, naming conventions, and folder structures across all packs



REQUIRED SKILLS

• 3+ years experience in hard surface 3D modeling (vehicles, weapons, mechanical objects)

• Strong topology skills — clean quads/tris, proper edge flow, no n-gons, manifold meshes

• PBR texturing experience — Substance Painter or Quixel Mixer (Metallic-Roughness workflow)

• UV unwrapping — manual layout, efficient use of 0-1 UV space, consistent texel density

• LOD creation — ability to produce optimized lower-detail versions that maintain silhouette quality

• Blender proficiency (primary tool) — modeling, UV, rendering (Cycles/EEVEE), export

• FBX/OBJ export experience — understanding of scale, transforms, and engine compatibility

• Rendering skills — studio lighting, clean presentation renders, turntable animations

• Basic rigging — simple mechanical rigs (rotating turrets, opening hatches, spinning wheels)



PREFERRED (NOT REQUIRED)

• Experience with Unreal Engine 5 (material setup, demo scenes)

• Experience with Unity HDRP

• Familiarity with 3ds Max or Maya

• Experience selling on Fab, CGTrader, TurboSquid, or similar marketplaces

• Concept art or design skills (ability to interpret loose references into detailed models)



SOFTWARE

• Required: Blender, Substance Painter (or Quixel Mixer)

• Preferred: 3ds Max, Maya, Marmoset Toolbag, ZBrush (for detail sculpting)

What We Provide

• Detailed reference images for every model

• A clear production schedule with weekly/monthly milestones

• Technical specifications document with exact quality standards

•  Creative direction and feedback on each deliverable

• Long-term, stable work with growth potential



TO APPLY

Please include in your application:

 1. Your portfolio — show hard surface work (vehicles, weapons, mechanical models). If you have marketplace listings, link them.

 2. Software you use — list your primary tools

 3. Your experience level — years of hard surface modeling, any marketplace/game studio experience

 4. Availability — can you start within 1-2 weeks? Can you commit full-time (40 hrs/week)?

 5. A short message about why you’re a good fit for this role

Do NOT apply if you primarily do character/organic modeling. This role is 100% hard surface.

title: Reservoir Geologist
description:
Our company, Black Belt Operating, LLC. is a Texas-based, privately-owned firm in The Woodlands, focusing on modernizing and improving historic oil and gas projects through exploration and redevelopment.



Join Black Belt Operating LLC, a leading player in the energy sector, as we expand our team! We're seeking highly experienced Filipino Reservoir Geologists to contribute their expertise to our dynamic projects.



Key qualifications include:



Stratigraphy: Reservoir Geologists study the sequence and layering of rocks to determine the geological history of an area. This helps in understanding the deposition of sediments and the formation of potential reservoirs.



Subsurface Mapping: Proficient in constructing detailed subsurface structure maps with a focus on data quality verification from well logs, demonstrating precision and accuracy.



Software Proficiency: Adaptable to new software platforms, ensuring seamless utilization for optimal results in project outcomes.



Reservoir Analysis: Expertise in calculating Original Oil in Place (OOIP) and Original Gas in Place (OGIP) for reservoirs, showcasing a deep understanding of reservoir dynamics.



Production Records: Skilled in utilizing production records to calculate Remaining Oil in Place (OIP) and Remaining Gas in Place (GIP), contributing to efficient reservoir management.



Risk Assessment: Assess the risks associated with exploration and production activities. They evaluate factors such as reservoir quality, connectivity, and potential for fluid movement to estimate the likelihood of successful hydrocarbon recovery.



Collaboration with Other Disciplines: Work closely with other professionals, including geophysicists, petrophysicists, and engineers. Collaborative efforts help in integrating various data sets and disciplines to gain a comprehensive understanding of the subsurface.



Reservoir Management: After the discovery of a reservoir, geologists contribute to its ongoing management. They monitor reservoir performance, suggest strategies for enhanced oil recovery (EOR), and provide input for field development plans.



If you are a proactive and seasoned Reservoir Geologist looking to make a significant impact, apply now and become a vital part of our innovative team at Black Belt Operating LLC!

title: Financial Modeler
description:
Our company, Black Belt Operating, LLC. is a Texas-based, privately-owned firm in The Woodlands, focusing on modernizing and improving historic oil and gas projects through exploration and redevelopment.



We are currently looking for PH-based, high-skilled financial modelers experts in the Upstream Oil and Gas Business.



In the Oil and Gas industry, a financial modeler plays a crucial role in developing and maintaining financial models that help analyze and make informed decisions about various aspects of the business. Here are some key responsibilities and tasks that a financial modeler in the oil and gas sector might undertake:



1. Project Valuation: Financial modelers are often involved in estimating the economic viability of oil and gas projects. They use financial models to assess the potential returns, risks, and overall value of exploration, drilling, and production projects.



2. Cash Flow Analysis: Financial modelers create cash flow models to project the cash inflows and outflows associated with exploration, development, and production activities. This involves considering factors such as production volumes, commodity prices, operating costs, and capital expenditures.



3. Risk Analysis: Oil and gas projects are subject to various risks, including commodity price fluctuations, geopolitical events, and operational challenges. Financial modelers incorporate risk factors into their models to assess the impact on financial outcomes and evaluate the project's resilience to different scenarios.



4. Scenario Analysis: Financial modelers conduct scenario analyses to evaluate the sensitivity of financial outcomes to changes in key variables, such as oil and gas prices, production volumes, and operating costs. This helps decision-makers understand the range of potential outcomes under different conditions.



5. Budgeting and Forecasting: Financial modelers contribute to the budgeting and forecasting process by developing models that project financial performance over a specific period. This includes creating detailed revenue projections, cost estimates, and overall financial statements.



6. Capital Budgeting: Financial modelers assist in the evaluation and prioritization of capital investments. They analyze the financial feasibility of various investment opportunities, considering factors like net present value (NPV), internal rate of return (IRR), and payback period.



7. Financial Reporting: Financial modelers contribute to the preparation of financial reports for internal and external stakeholders. This involves summarizing key financial metrics, explaining variances, and presenting the financial implications of different decisions.



8. Mergers and Acquisitions (M&A): In the context of M&A activities, financial modelers assess the financial impact of potential acquisitions or divestitures. They analyze the financial health of target companies and project the combined financials after a merger or acquisition.



Join our dynamic team, bringing expertise to contribute to cutting-edge projects, and harnessing your in-depth knowledge. Elevate your career with a company committed to innovation and growth. Apply now at Black Belt Operating, LLC. to be part of our success in the dynamic energy sector!

We are hiring two full-time Remote Sales Consumer Advisors to support a growing inbound lead flow. This is a closing role, not a cold-calling role. You will speak with primarily older, US-based prospects, educate them on the service, answer questions, guide them through the agreement live, collect required information, and then hand the client off to fulfillment.

This is a strong fit for someone who is confident on the phone, organized in a CRM, and comfortable handling sensitive conversations with clarity and empathy.



Work Hours

Full-time, 40 hours per week

US CST hours by default

Monthly performance bonus: tiered structure based on results

Bonus is tied to cash received, not just closed deals



Key Responsibilities

1) Phone Sales and Closing

Handle inbound and assigned leads, run consultative sales conversations

Build trust quickly with an older US demographic

Clearly explain the service, process, expectations, and next steps

Confidently ask for the sale, overcome objections, and close deals

Close within a typical cycle of same day to 14 days, including follow-ups as needed



2) Contract Review and Client Commitment

Walk clients through the agreement in real time on the call

Ensure clients understand what they are signing up for

Collect required details accurately to avoid downstream fulfillment issues





3) CRM and Lead Management (GoHighLevel)

Log all activity in the CRM with clean notes and accurate statuses

Follow the team’s lead management process to avoid missed follow-ups

Upload new clients into the CRM upon close, then hand off to fulfillment





4) Follow-up Discipline

Execute structured follow-up sequences to recover leads and close within the window

Stay responsive and organized across callbacks, scheduled follow-ups, and inbound replies





5) Performance and Continuous Improvement

Participate in daily quick check-ins during ramp (approx. 20 minutes)

Review performance metrics, identify breakdowns, and apply coaching fast

Contribute feedback to improve scripts, training docs, and call flow





Success Metrics

Contact rate and speed to first response

Show rate for scheduled calls

Close rate and close cycle length (0 to 14 days typical)

Revenue collected (used for bonus calculations)

CRM hygiene, no missed leads, accurate notes, consistent follow-ups

Call quality, clarity, trust-building, compliance with process



Required Skills and Experience

2+ years in phone-based sales, inside sales, or high-ticket closing preferred

Strong closing instincts, objection handling, and consultative communication

High comfort speaking with older US prospects

Strong CRM habits, preferably GoHighLevel (or similar CRMs)

Reliable internet, quiet workspace, professional headset setup

Coachable, consistent, and able to ramp quickly with daily feedback



Accent and Language Preferences

Strong preference for a neutral, easy-to-understand English accent



Please submit a mock/sales call recording.

title: Short-Form Video & Content Marketing VA
description:
Company Overview

A fast-growing CPG food brand in the seasoning and specialty salt space, focused on bold flavor, home chefs, and elevated everyday cooking. The brand blends culinary creativity with lifestyle content, including food, cocktails, travel, and outdoor experiences.

The founder is highly creative and produces a large volume of raw content but needs support turning that into consistent, strategic, revenue-driving digital assets.

This is an early-stage, self-funded brand with strong personality and significant growth potential.

This person will:

Edit and repurpose short-form video content

Support light blog writing and content repurposing

Schedule and publish content across platforms

Help create consistency and 
ntum across TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube Shorts

Act as a creative execution partner while the founder focuses on sales, partnerships, and growth

This role starts lean, approximately 8 hours video and 2 hours copy weekly, and may expand over time.

Work Hours: Flexible, overlap with US CST preferred

Commitment: Part-time to start, long-term potential



Core Responsibilities



Short-Form Video Editing (Primary Focus)

Edit high-volume short-form content for:

TikTok

Instagram Reels

YouTube Shorts

Create strong hooks and attention-grabbing first 3 seconds

Add captions, text overlays, light motion graphics

Optimize pacing for engagement and retention

Repurpose older content into fresh formats

Pull clips from longer footage such as cooking, taste tests, interviews

Organize and manage large raw footage library, over 2TB existing content

Content themes include:

Cooking demos

Cocktail and mocktail recipes

Taste tests, including competitor comparisons

Outdoor and travel lifestyle content

Event footage including celebrity interactions

Product-forward usage 
nts



Blog and Copy Support (Secondary Focus)

Convert video content into SEO-friendly blog posts on Shopify

Turn recipe walkthroughs into structured written recipes

Support light
 copy repurposing for Klaviyo

Help draft captions aligned with brand voice

Assist with organizing and formatting digitized legacy recipes

This is not a full-time copywriter role, but must be comfortable writing clear, structured content.



Content Publishing and Scheduling

Upload and schedule posts using:

Meta Business Suite

TikTok Studio

YouTube Studio

Or approved scheduling tool

Manage posting calendar

Ensure consistency across platforms

Add CTAs as directed

Coordinate with founder on publishing approvals when needed



Content Optimization and Iteration

Track which short-form content performs best

Identify patterns in engagement

Suggest testing angles such as blind taste tests or bold comparisons

Support experimentation mindset

This role supports iteration and 
ntum, not perfection.



Digital Organization

Maintain organized Google Drive structure

Categorize footage by:

Theme

Product type

Platform

CTA direction

Support asset management for future campaigns



Required Skills

Strong short-form video editing experience

Skilled in CapCut, Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or similar

Deep understanding of TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts formatting

Ability to create engaging hooks

Comfortable working with founder-led content

Basic copywriting skills

Experience working with Shopify blogs

Organized and process-oriented

Comfortable handling large volumes of content

title: Structural Engineer (Remote)
description:
We seeking a highly skilled Structural Engineer to join our growing international team. This role is ideal for a detail-driven, technically strong engineer who can independently produce high-quality structural models, analysis, designs, and documentation for both reinforced concrete and structural steel buildings.

We work on premium residential and commercial projects, and we are looking for someone who can deliver engineering outputs that meet international standards.



Key Responsibilities

You will be responsible for producing complete structural engineering deliverables, including:

Structural Modelling & Analysis

- Develop structural models using industry-standard software (ETABS, STAAD, SAP2000, etc.)

- Perform gravity, lateral, and dynamic analysis for low-rise and mid-rise buildings

- Optimize structural systems for cost, constructability, and performance

Elemental & Member Design

- Design reinforced concrete elements (slabs, beams, columns, footings, retaining walls)

- Design structural steel elements (beams, columns, trusses, connections)

- Apply relevant international codes (ASCE, ACI, AISC, IBC, etc. American Standards)

Engineering Detailing

- Prepare structural plans, sections, schedules, and connection details

- Produce clean, accurate CAD/Revit drawings

- Coordinate with architectural and MEP layouts

Structural Design Reports

- Prepare full calculation packages

- Write clear, professional structural design reports

- Document assumptions, load paths, design criteria, and analysis summaries



Qualifications

- Bachelor’s degree in Civil/Structural Engineering (Master’s is a plus)

- Minimum 3–5 years experience in building structural design

- Strong proficiency in structural analysis software

- Excellent understanding of RC and steel design principles

- Ability to produce clean, organized engineering documentation

- Strong English communication skills (written and verbal)

- Reliable internet and ability to work remotely



How to Apply

- Updated CV

- Sample structural models (screenshots or files)

- Sample calculation report

- Sample drawings or detailing work

- Expected monthly rate

title: Cold Caller / Appointment Setter (Australia) - Excellent English + Experience in cold calling

We are growing quickly and need someone reliable who is comfortable speaking with business owners & knows how to book them in for a no pressure demo call.

Australia Calling Hours

10:30 AM – 3:30 PM AEST Time (flexible however highly preferred)



Exact schedule will be confirmed after hiring.



— Responsibilities



• Cold call businesses in Australia 

• Speak confidently w/ casual tone with business owners

• Ask basic qualification questions

• Book demo appointments in our calendar

• Log call outcomes and notes into Google Sheets or CRM

• Follow up with prospects who ask to be called later (manually must be on top of this)



— Requirements



• Excellent spoken English (clear, confident, natural)

• 1+ year experience in cold calling or appointment setting

• Comfortable handling objections and rejection

• Reliable internet connection

• Quiet workspace for calling

• Good quality headset / mic



— Performance Targets



•
dials per day

- Dials, Connects, Meetings booked, Shows, Call notes



— Bonuses

Performance bonuses for:

• Booking 5+ meetings per week

• Potential bonus on meetings that convert into paying clients, will be discussed during hiring process.



— How to Apply

2. Your latest call statistics (if available):

- Dials per day

title: AI Automation & Voice Agent Builder (Outbound Calling Systems)

---



**We are looking for builders, not task followers.**

If you know how to turn ideas into systems — apply now.

title: Client Success Account Manager / Campaign Strategist (Growth and Sales-Focused)
description:
About StoryGen

StoryGen (www.storygen.agency) is a B2B lead generation agency helping companies build predictable outbound pipelines that actually scale.



We specialize in cold-calling-led outbound systems combining structured execution, performance tracking, and AI-powered tools to consistently generate high-quality opportunities.



We work hands-on with each client to turn outbound into a reliable growth channel, not just a one-off effort.



About the Role

We’re hiring a Remote Account Manager / Campaign Strategist to take full ownership of client campaigns from initial strategy through continuous optimization.



This is not a typical account management role. You’ll be at the center of execution, performance, and client success working directly with data, teams, and clients to drive measurable results.



If you enjoy turning strategy into action and improving campaigns based on real insights, this role is built for you.



What You’ll Be Doing

Own Client Success

- Lead onboarding and campaign kickoffs with clarity and structure

- Translate client goals into actionable outbound strategies

- Run regular performance check-ins and strategic reviews

- Build long-term client relationships through results and communication



Drive Campaign Performance

- Define ICPs and targeting strategies

- Develop and refine cold calling scripts and messaging

- Use real campaign data and BDR feedback to improve outcomes

- Continuously test, iterate, and optimize outreach approaches



Collaborate Across Teams

- Guide BDR teams on messaging and targeting direction

- Work with data/list building teams to ensure quality lead inputs

- Partner with operations to improve processes and workflows

- Monitor campaigns closely and make timely adjustments



Turn Data Into Action

- Track and interpret key campaign metrics

- Deliver clear, structured updates to clients

- Provide recommendations that directly impact performance



What We’re Looking For

- 1–2 years of hands-on B2B cold calling experience

- 2+ years in Account Management, Client Success, or Campaign Management (B2B or lead gen preferred)

- Strong writing skills for outbound messaging and scripts

- Solid understanding of ICP development and outbound strategy

- Confident communicator who can lead client conversations

- Highly organized and able to manage multiple campaigns

- Comfortable working remotely with tools like HubSpot, Slack, Coda, Calendly, Nooks, Aircall, etc.

- Experience using AI tools to improve workflows is a plus



Compensation & Benefits

- Base Salary: USD 1,500/month

- On-Target Earnings: Up to USD 2,000/month (performance-based)

- Fully remote role with a global team

- Structured systems and strong operational support

- Growth opportunities as the company scales



Work Schedule

- Monday to Friday

- 8:30 AM – 6:00 PM (Eastern Time)



Application Process

We use a structured and objective hiring process to ensure fairness for all candidates.



To apply, complete the assessment and upload the following in the same link:



- Resume

- Internet speed test result

- Short Loom audio introduction (guide questions provided)



Apply here:

title: GTM B2C Marketing Growth Coordinator
description:
The Role



We're looking for a scrappy, entrepreneurial marketer to own our consumer go-to-market across social channels -- TikTok, Reddit, UGC,
/X, and wherever our users actually spend time. This isn't a "schedule posts and report metrics" role. You'll be the person who figures out what works, coordinates the people who execute it, and pushes hard on the things that move the needle.



What You'll Do



Own the social and community growth playbook from scratch -- TikTok, Reddit, UGC pipelines, influencer seeding, whatever gets traction

Coordinate and manage a small roster of freelancers (content creators, UGC producers, editors) -- you're the point person, not us

Develop and run high-growth launch strategies for new product releases and feature drops

Spot trends early and move fast -- we care about speed and taste, not 14-slide decks

Track what's working with a bias toward action, not perfection



Who You Are



You've grown something before -- a brand, a side project, a creator account, a community. You have the receipts

You think like a founder, not an employee. You don't wait to be told what to do

You understand B2C consumer psychology and what makes people share, download, or talk about a product

You're fluent in TikTok and Reddit culture -- not just as a marketer, but as a user

You can manage freelancers and vendors without hand-holding. You're organized enough to keep things moving and direct enough to give clear feedback

You're comfortable with ambiguity and a fast-moving, small team



Bonus



Experience with app launches or mobile-first products

You've worked with UGC creators or micro-influencers at scale

You've done growth work in health, social, or lifestyle apps



Why This Role



You'll have real ownership and direct impact from day one. No middle management, no red tape. If you're the kind of person who's been waiting for a role where you can actually run the show on growth and social -- this is it.

description:

We are hiring a Customer Care Representative to support our customers across
, chat, and phone, ensuring a positive and seamless experience at every touchpoint.



About the Company



ProspectsPLUS! is a direct-mail marketing company that provides design, printing, mailing, and targeted list services primarily for real estate professionals and small businesses. Founded in 1998 and based in Florida, the company offers customizable marketing materials such as postcards, brochures, newsletters, and automated mailing campaigns to help businesses generate leads and promote their services.



Our web-to-print platform allows users to create targeted mailing lists using demographic, geographic, and AI-generated data, enabling more effective outreach to potential customers. We focus on helping real estate agents and other professionals streamline marketing efforts and maintain consistent communication with prospects.

title: Operations Associate
description:

Lightningrowth is a US-based performance marketing agency specializing in Meta ads lead generation for home improvement and remodeling businesses.

We've been in business for 3 years and currently run Meta ad campaigns for over 40 active clients — including 12 of the Top 500 largest remodeling companies in the US.

We are hiring a full-time Operations Associate to own the internal systems that keep our agency running. This is not a VA role. This is a dedicated systems and process position for someone who takes ownership, thinks in automations, and genuinely enjoys keeping things clean and organized.

Have 2+ years of ClickUp experience as an admin or workspace manager — not just a tea
mber

Have 2+ years of advanced Google Sheets experience building data dashboards and reports

Have experience automating tasks or workflows using any platform

Want a stable, long-term role with a growing agency

Enjoy systems, process documentation, and operational ownership

This role is not a good fit if you:

Have only used ClickUp as a tea
mber and never managed or built a workspace

Know basic formulas in Google Sheets but have not built data dashboards or reporting systems

Need frequent supervision or check-ins to stay on track

Are looking for part-time or short-term work

Owning our ClickUp workspace — structure, task management, templates, and automations for the full team

Writing and maintaining all company SOPs — every repeatable process documented clearly and kept current

Managing internal contractor onboarding and offboarding

Required Experience:

2+ years advanced Google Sheets — data dashboards, large datasets, reporting for non-technical stakeholders

Built and maintained multi-step automated workflows end to end (
, Zapier, n8n, or similar)

Built systems and processes from scratch inside a small or growing team

Strong written English



Compensation and Work Structure:

$1,500 – $2,000 USD per month, depending on experience

Full-time, 40 hours per week

Long-term role

Paid twice a month

We value ownership, consistency, and people who take initiative. We are looking for someone who wants to grow with us long-term.



How to Apply:

To apply, complete our short application form here:



The form takes 5–10 minutes to complete. You will need a Loom account (free at 
) to record a short video as part of your application.

title: Content Strategist & Script Writer for Day1 Agency (NYC Based Social Media Agency)
description:
Day1 Agency is a NYC based social media and content agency producing viral short form video content for a growing roster of US brands across lifestyle, health, food, and service industries. Our content has generated hundreds of millions of views across Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and
. You can see our work at 



We are looking for a Content Strategist and Script Writer who can own the creative and strategic layer of our content production. This is not a task execution role. This is a role for someone who thinks deeply about what makes content work, stays on top of trends before anyone else, and can write scripts that stop scrollers in the first 3 seconds. You will own script drafting, trend research, creative ideation, content calendars, and post production briefs for our in house editor. You will work directly with the founder and the broader team.



Core responsibilities:



Write scripts for short form video content across multiple client brands (target 15 to 25 scripts per week)

Research and identify trends on TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts that are relevant to each client

Build weekly and monthly content calendars for each client

Develop creative concepts and series ideas that can become repeatable content formats

Write post production briefs for the editor so edits align with the intended creative vision

Analyze competitor content and surface insights we can apply to our work

Stay deeply plugged into US culture, internet humor, and platform specific trends



Core skills we are looking for:



Proven experience writing short form video scripts that have performed well

Deep understanding of US based audience behavior, cultural references, and platform algorithms

Strong research skills and ability to quickly learn new industries and brand voices

Experience working in a social media or content agency is a significant plus

Excellent written English



Key traits we are looking for:



Proactive and self driven (this is the single most important trait)

Brings ideas to the team without being asked

Takes ownership of projects rather than waiting for instructions

Flexible and adaptable across different brands and creative styles

Has strong opinions about what makes content work



Rate and hours:

Rate: $12 to $15 per hour USD depending on experience

Hours: 15 to 20 hours per week to start, with room to grow

EST working hours preferred for team collaboration, though we are flexible on the execution work



How to apply:

Before applying, please take 5 minutes to look at our work at day1.agency so you understand the kind of content we create.

In your application, please include the following three things:



A brief paragraph about your experience writing short form video scripts, including the types of brands or content you have worked on.

Three content ideas for a laundry pickup app targeting Gen Z in NYC. These should be specific enough to actually produce, not generic concepts. Include the hook, the premise, and why you think it would work.

A link to one short form video (TikTok, Reel, or Short) that you think is brilliant, and explain in two sentences why it works.



Applications that do not include all three items will not be reviewed. We are specifically looking for people who follow instructions and bring thoughtful work to the table from the first touchpoint.

We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Executive Operations Assistant - Part-Time (VIDEO REQUIREMENT)
description:
Title: Part-Time Executive Operations Assistant - Must Submit Video Application

Location: Remote, Philippines-based

Hours: Part-time, 2-3 hours per day, Monday to Friday (consistent daily schedule required)

Salary: Highly dependent on experience (part-time, 2-3 hours per day)



About Us

We're Pure Proposals, a consulting agency working with clients across Australia, the US, Canada, New Zealand, and the UK. We help businesses build professional proposal and quoting systems using PandaDoc. The founder handles sales and partner relationships. We have a project lead handling delivery. We need someone to own the day-to-day operations.

This is not a data entry or calendar management role. You'll be the operational backbone of a small, fast-moving agency - writing professional
s to clients, keeping our CRM accurate, and coordinating with our software partner's sales team. You'll represent the business directly.

What You'll Own



Triage the inbox daily. Flag urgent items, handle routine client responses independently.

Send post-project check-in
s to clients (professional, warm, natural tone).

Schedule calls across Australia, US, UK, and European timezones.

Keep HubSpot deals, contacts, and pipeline accurate and up to date.

Pull weekly reports (deal pipeline, commission tracking).

Coordinate with our software partner's account executives on shared opportunities.

Assemble case study drafts from project notes.

QA check outputs before they reach clients.



What We're Looking For



Excellent spoken and written English. Professional, warm, natural. Clients should not be able to tell the
 wasn't written by the founder.

CRM experience (HubSpot preferred, Salesforce/Pipedrive also fine).

Reliable. 2-3 hours per day, every weekday, on schedule.

Detail-oriented. Accurate CRM data, polished client
s.

Proactive. Flag issues without being asked.



Nice to have: experience in consulting/agency environments, familiarity with PandaDoc or Notion, experience supporting a founder or executive.



HOW TO APPLY - VIDEO REQUIRED

Applications without a video will not be reviewed. MAKE SURE YOU WRITE "VIDEO" in the title please.



Record a 2-3 minute video of yourself (use Loom, Google Drive, or YouTube unlisted). In the video, please cover these points in order:



1. Introduce yourself. Your name, where you're based, and your available working hours each day (in your timezone).



2. CRM experience. Which CRM tools you've used (HubSpot, Salesforce, Pipedrive, etc), what you did in them, and for how long.



3. Client communication example. Describe a time you managed client communications or operations on behalf of someone else. What was the situation, what did you do, and what was the outcome?



4. Read this paragraph aloud: "Hi Sarah, just checking in to see how everything's going two weeks after launch. We want to make sure the templates are working smoothly for your team. If anything needs tweaking or if you have questions, just let us know. We're here to help."



5. Your salary expectation for this part-time role (2-3 hours per day, Monday to Friday).



Send your application with:



The video link (Loom, Google Drive, or YouTube unlisted)

Your
 address

One sentence: why this role interests you



That's it. No resume needed. The video tells us everything.



Please note that if you send a resume we will not view it ONLY submissions with a video which is directly recorded FOR this application and answers these points will actually be considered.

    Reply to Instagram and TikTok comments using brand guidelines

    Respond to DMs and escalate leads, pricing questions, or sensitive messages

    Hide or report spam or inappropriate comments

    Draft first version captions based on examples and brand voice

    Schedule approved posts using Metricool

    Pull weekly performance metrics for each client

    Follow brand voice instructions and SOPs closely

    Flag anything unclear instead of guessing

    Bring small improvements and observations to the team



Requirements:



    Strong written English

    Experience managing Instagram and TikTok accounts

    Comfortable following brand voice guidelines across multiple clients

    Organized and detail oriented

    Familiar with scheduling tools (Metricool preferred, others OK)

    Reliable internet and consistent availability

    Some overlap with EST business hours preferred



Nice to Have:



    Experience working with US based clients

    Agency experience

    Community management for multiple brands



Hours and Growth:



This role starts at 12 - 15 hours per week with room to grow to 25 to 30 hours as the agency scales. We are looking for someone who wants to grow with us long term, not just fill a short term contract.



How to Apply:



Before applying, please take a few minutes to look at our work at day1.agency so you understand the kind of content we create.



In your application, please include the following four items:



 A brief paragraph about your experience managing Instagram and TikTok community management for multiple brands or clients.

 Which social media scheduling tools you have used, and which one you prefer and why.

One specific example of a time you noticed something at work that was not part of your assigned tasks and did something about it. We are looking for people who take initiative, not just people who complete tasks.

 Include the word "ENGAGEMENT" somewhere in your application so we know you read this carefully.



Applications that do not include all four items will not be reviewed. We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Support Staff Member
description:
At College HUNKS Hauling Junk & Moving, our success depends on our people living our core values every day: Building Leaders; Listen, Fulfill, and Delight; Create a Fun, Enthusiastic Team Environment; and Always Branding. A Support Staff Member is a supportive force for each core value. The ideal employee is a flexible problem solver with superb communication skills and a detail-oriented mindset. Multitasking and the ability to deftly handle the unexpected are essential qualities to bring to the position. The ideal candidate will be competent in prioritizing and working with little supervision. They will be self-motivated and trustworthy. They must be a HUNK (Honest, Uniformed, Nice, Knowledgeable service). 

Objectives of this Role:

• 100% client amazement – Customer Support experience is necessary for success

• Support of Operations Management, including Owners, Office Manager, and Operations Team via SLACK – must understand SLACK channels and post information daily

• Effective communication with clients, potential clients and potential HUNKS via CRMs

Duties include but are not limited to:

• Warmly introduce clients to our local operations via phone communication, also known as a “Welcome Call” to identify details of their service request

• Communicate with clients to confirm their appointments

• Communicate with potential clients by following up on non-booked estimates

• Follow up with clients regarding claims or changes to their service 

• Manage Indeed dashboard via contacting recruits with screening questions for hiring events

• Create and update records and databases with personnel, financial and other data

• Assist colleagues whenever necessary

• Prepare correspondence, documentation, or presentation materials

Skills and Qualifications

• Highly organized multitasker who works well in a fast-paced environment

• Willingness to learn and to grow with the company

• Outstanding communication and interpersonal abilities

• Strong time-management skills and multitasking ability

• Excellent organizational and leadership skills

• Familiarity with office management procedures and basic accounting principles

• Prior experience handling administrative responsibilities or related field

• Sales or customer service experience is required

• Proficient computer skills, including Microsoft Office Suite (Word, PowerPoint, and Excel), Google Docs/Spreadsheets, SLACK and basic CRMs.



MUST HAVE ACCESS TO INTERNET AND PHONE FOR INTERNATIONAL CALLS. 

MUST HAVE FAILOVER INTERNET PLAN (MOBILE HOTSPOTS, 4G BACKUP UNIT, ETC.)

title: Level's Marketing Specialist
description:
***Go to w w w. l e v e l. p h to submit your application***

This is a remote position.



About Us:



We’re Level, a fast-moving and fast-growing recruiting and staffing agency that connects work-from-home Filipinos (Virtual Assistants) with clients in the US. Our rapid growth has earned us a spot on Austin’s top 50 fastest-growing private companies. We attribute this success to prioritizing employee satisfaction, which in turn leads to satisfied clients. We value being dependable, relational, humble, and just. Our team is close-knit and dedicated to our mission, setting big goals both personally and professionally.



We are in need of an experienced Marketing Specialist who will be responsible for showcasing our company’s brand both internally and externally, developing marketing and social media strategies for continued growth, and supporting our recruiting efforts. This person will be responsible for managing multiple social media accounts, WordPress websites, and interacting with various departments for various marketing needs, among other duties. 



The right fit for this position will come with ideas and strategies to ensure we’re living and showcasing our mission. We’re looking for someone who is not afraid to speak up, try new things, and work independently, in due time of course. We don’t try to pretend to be a fancy, rigid corporate company, and the right person will need to convey a ‘casual professional’ tone, being authentic to who we are. As this is a new role within the company, we require someone that can jump in and take charge as an expert in this field.



Responsibilities:

> Promote our company mission and values

> Create marketing and social media campaigns and strategies

> Grow and expand company social media presence

> Manage and grow multiple
 pages and groups

> Monitor, analyze, and promote
 Workplace engagement activity within the company

> Post jobs on social media, job posting sites, websites, etc.

> Create and maintain multiple WordPress websites 

> Manage the creation of written, graphics and illustrative materials

> Work collaboratively with all departments



Qualifications:

> 3+ years of  experience as a marketing specialist, generalist, manager, or similar role

> Experience working as a VA is preferred, though not required

> High emotional intelligence

> Experience with major social media platforms

> Knowledge of major online marketing channels

> Photo and video editing experience preferred

> Content creation experience

> Strong communication and presentation skills

> Analytical and creative problem-solving skills

> Ability to produce quality output on time

> Ability to work independently

> Great verbal and written communication skills

> Fluent in English



Schedule: M-F, 9:00 am - 6:00 pm ET (M-F, 9:00 pm - 6:00 am PHT)



What’s in it for You:

Rate: 1500 USD/month

- Company-paid comprehensive HMO for you and a dependent - not just an allowance! Plus option to add additional dependents

- Life Insurance worth Php100k

- 10 paid company holidays off annually

- Unlimited personal paid time off, we won’t bother you on your time-off.

- Work from anywhere in the Philippines—remotely, no office, no commute.

- We genuinely care about your growth—both professionally and personally. We support each other’s goals, weekly check-ins, and offer opportunities to learn and grow along the way.

- Guaranteed pay on time, every time (3% higher exchange rates than most payment systems) - we take care of transaction fees so you don't have to!

- Immediate hiring process to start as soon as possible



***Go to w w w. l e v e l. p h to submit your application***

title: CapCut Video Editor for Social Media Reels/UGC Videos
description:
Looking for a skilled CapCut video editor who can follow directions, take feedback, meet deadlines, and bring UGC-style content to life.



Final videos will be 20-60 seconds long and primarily used for social media ads and UGC (TikTok, Instagram Reels).



I will provide all raw footage, script reads, b-roll, and clear, structured editing instructions. Your role is to edit everything together into engaging, hook-focused, high-converting videos. You will send them back to me via a Google Drive folder I have created. 



Responsibilities:

- Edit short-form UGC videos (20-60 seconds)

- Add engaging captions/subtitles (clean, modern style)

- Use fast cuts, zooms, and pacing to keep attention

- Follow hook-focused editing (strong first 3 seconds)

- Add sound effects when needed (no music)

- Match different editing styles depending on the brand (will provide creative briefs)



Expectations:

- Clear communication and response times within 24 hours (Monday–Friday)

- Ability to deliver edits within 3–7 days unless discussed otherwise

- Open to feedback and willing to complete 1 revision if needed

- Strong attention to detail and ability to follow instructions exactly



Workload:

- Ongoing work (5-12 videos per week depending on performance)

- High potential for long-term partnership after one week paid trial to see if editing and work styles align



Requirements:

- Must be experienced with CapCut

- Experience editing UGC or social media ads preferred

- Strong understanding of TikTok/Reels-style editing

- Reliable internet and ability to send/receive large files via Google Drive



To Apply:

- Send examples of CapCut edits (UGC or short-form content preferred)

- Include the word “UGCEDIT” in your application so I know you read this

- (Optional) Share your favorite creator or brand editing style



Niche: lifestyle; fitness; beauty; fashion videos

Style: fast-paced, hook-focused, captions, little sound effects, trending cuts



**Bonus structure available for high-performing videos. More details to follow**



Top applicants may be asked to complete a short paid test edit.

title: Transaction Coordinator
description:
Join a fully remote team where your ideas matter, your work is celebrated, and your growth comes first. Do your best work from anywhere and build a career you’re proud of.





Key Responsibilities:

Manage all steps of contract-to-close transactions.

Review purchase agreements, addendums, and contracts for accuracy and compliance.

Open escrow and track deadlines for inspections, appraisals, financing, and contingencies.

Maintain communication with clients, agents, lenders, title/escrow officers, and cooperating brokers.

Prepare and deliver required disclosures and documentation.

Update and manage CRM and transaction management platforms.

Ensure all documents are signed, completed, and uploaded to compliance systems.

Schedule inspections, appraisals, and closings as needed.

Provide weekly status updates to agents and clients.

Assist with post-closing follow-up and client retention activities.

Perform other administrative tasks as needed.



Qualifications:

Experience as a Transaction Coordinator, Real Estate Assistant, or similar role (Keller Williams experience is a plus).

Strong understanding of real estate contracts, timelines, and compliance.

Skilled with transaction management tools (DocuSign, KW Command, or similar).

Excellent organizational, multitasking, and time management skills.

Strong written and verbal communication.

Self-motivated and able to work independently and as part of a team.



Education & Experience:

Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Finance, or related field (preferred).

1–2 years of real estate or administrative experience.

Knowledge of Keller Williams systems/Command is a plus.



Compensation & Benefits:

Paid Time Off

Health insurance coverage or reimbursement

Yearly bonus and performance-based salary increases

Internet allowance

Remote-first, growth-oriented company culture

Opportunities for advancement and skill development

Collaborative, supportive team environment



Minimum Technical Requirements

Processor (CPU): Intel Core i5 (10th generation or newer) or AMD Ryzen 5 (3000 series or newer)

Memory (RAM): 16 GB recommended

Storage: 256 GB SSD (minimum)

Operating System: Windows 11 (Home or Pro) or macOS

Display (Dual Setup Required): Dual-monitor setup (two screens) to support productivity; a laptop with an external monitor is acceptable

Webcam & Audio: 720p HD webcam and external microphone or noise-cancelling headset

Internet Connection: Reliable high-speed internet connection suitable for video conferencing

Backup Requirements: Backup devices for computer, internet, and power (e.g., secondary device, hotspot, and power backup) must be available to ensure continuity during outages





We do NOT accept applications via this platform.
